sessions.summary: Tested Create Account and Create Contact actions end-to-end. Create Account works. Create Contact blocked by accountId DataTypeMismatch — Organization Relationship not populating correctly. Also found and fixed multiple ingest issues (country enum, phone format, firstLineName mapping).

Ran LLM Council on idea for intelligent alert triage bot + Grafana improvements. Council validated the idea but recommended: audit 30-day alert volume first, get team lead buy-in, start with one suppression rule (not a bot). Grafana improvements as phase 2.

Designed and implemented iterate.js re-engagement module. LLM Council evaluated architecture (B vs C vs event-driven). Final design: poll review_requested timeline events (5min) + Slack ptal trigger. Per-finding fix validation, dev reply handling, never auto-resolve threads. Spec written, reviewed, implemented.

Fixed MCP -32000 launch failure. Root cause: plugin framework doesn't resolve relative .mcp.json paths from plugin root. Solution: esbuild bundle (945KB, zero runtime deps) + bash glob path for version-independent resolution. PR #41 review addressed, PR #45 opened with zero-setup approach.

Updated Jira subtasks (9d logged, Foundation+Account+IndivCustomer→Done, Contact→InProgress). Investigated Create Contact mapping: organizationCrmId UUID mapped to displayId (maxLength 10) instead of accountId. Also found curl ingests don't create profiles vs CDP UI test button. Root cause: JourneyService 'MapParameters V2 failed' with MaximumLength validation.

Fixed 3 bugs that broke hebrew-dictate: (1) enqueue_chunk() removed from listen_loop — audio recorded but never transcribed, (2) ctypes CallNextHookEx lParam overflow on 64-bit Windows — crashed hook and froze keyboard, (3) model hardcoded to CPU instead of CUDA. Final fix: run from repo dir which uses keyboard library (not ctypes hook) and CUDA-first loading.

Built chub-slack-bot from scratch. Full pipeline: 4 parallel AI review agents (conventions, safety, tests, general code quality), inline GitHub PR comments with why + fix suggestions, self-learning agent (comment signals at 0.5x, re-engagement at 1.5x), periodic sweep for merged PRs, iterate.js for re-review on dev responses. 3 LLM Councils guided architecture decisions. Pushed to CDP/chub-slack-bot. Plugin bumped to v0.4.0 with README and presentation.

sessions.project: CHUB Code Reviewer — live review + goal strategy
sessions.summary: Ran CHUB review on AudienceService PR #14 (CXCDP-37911 defensive null-checks). Found 1 moderate issue (CROSS-002: missing unit tests). Posted inline comment to GitHub. LLM Council on goal attribution — verdict: CHUB work routes to Goal 2 (tooling), personal reviews stay Goal 3.
